# Matt Pocock Domain Modeling Fallback

This directory vendors a small fallback snapshot from Matt Pocock's
MIT-licensed `skills` repository.

Use these files only when the current agent runtime does not expose Matt
Pocock's `domain-modeling` or `grill-with-docs` guidance.

## Provenance

- Upstream repository: https://github.com/mattpocock/skills
- Upstream paths:
  - `skills/engineering/domain-modeling/CONTEXT-FORMAT.md`
  - `skills/engineering/domain-modeling/ADR-FORMAT.md`
- License: MIT
- Vendored sync date: 2026-06-18
- Upstream commit: `6eeb81b5fcfeeb5bd531dd47ab2f9f2bbea27461`

## Maintenance

Do not edit these files as first-party documentation. If the fallback needs to
change, resync it from upstream and update the provenance above.

First-party planning guidance for this repo belongs in
`../../references/PLAN-FORMAT.md`.
